title: Dreamy Creamy American Cheese Casserole
description: A sweet and aerated American dish featuring cheese and a mirepoix base, perfect for a sick day, made with macrobiotic-friendly ingredients and cooked on a salt block.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
Cook the whole wheat pasta according to package instructions and set aside.
In a large skillet, saute the chopped onions, carrots, and celery in melted butter until tender.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked pasta, sauteed mirepoix, and american cheese slices.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Pour the milk mixture over the pasta mixture and stir until well combined.
Transfer the mixture to a salt block and smooth the top.
Bake the casserole in the preheated oven for 25 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the casserole is heated through.
Remove the casserole from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving.
